name: Liquid Digital Valve – Unofficial Stationeers Wiki

properties.description: Locks the Liquid Digital Valve, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Liquid Digital Valve on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns 100. (Assumption) Returns the maximum throughput percentage of the Liquid Digital Valve.
Returns whether the Liquid Digital Valve is currently flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power needed for the Liquid Digital Valve.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Does not function. (Assumption) Returns the differential in pressure between the sides of the Liquid Digital Valve.
(Assumption) Returns (-517628750) a unique type identifier for the Liquid Digital Valve.
Returns whether the Liquid Digital Valve is receiving power and is turned on. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
